message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classHeaderFontColor black
skinparam classHeaderBorderColor black
skinparam classHeaderBorderThickness 1
skinparam classHeaderPadding 5
skinparam classPadding 5
skinparam classMargin 10
skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #666666
skinparam classStereotypeFontSize 10
skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle italic
skinparam classStereotypeFontName "Arial"
skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #666666
skinparam classStereotypeFontSize 10
skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle italic
skinparam classStereotypeFontName "Arial"
skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #666666
skinparam classStereotypeFontSize 10
skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle italic
skinparam classStereotypeFontName "Arial"

class Observer {
    + notify(event: ManagerEvent)
}

class EntityManager {
    - entities: List<Entity>
    - systems: Set<Observer>
    + subscribe(system: Observer)
    + addEntity(entity: Entity)
    + removeEntity(id: Int)
    - notifySystems(event: ManagerEvent)
}

class System {
    - managedTypes: List<ComponentType>
    - filteredEntities: List<Entity>
    + addEntityRef(): Unit
    + removeEntityRef(): Unit
    + update(): Unit
    - checkEntityIsCompatible(): Unit
}

class Entity {
    <<Product Type>>
    + ID : Int
    + components : Map<ComponentType, Component>
}

class ComponentType {
    DIRECTION,
    POSITION,
    SPEED,
    SPAWN,
    ...
}

class Component {
    <<Product Type>>
    + type: ComponentType
}

Observer <|-- System
EntityManager "1" *-- "0..*" Entity
EntityManager "0..*" o-- "0..*" Observer
System "1..*" *-- "0..*" ComponentType
System "0..*" o-- "0..*" Entity
Entity "1" *-- "0..*" Component
ComponentType "1" *-- "1" Component

note right of Entity
    Module + Case Class
end note

@enduml
